feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Connection from BTP ABAP System to PostgreSQL DB via ODBC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Are we able to connect Postgresql db from BTP ABAP system via ODBC ? 

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: USE OF AI IN ECLIPSE
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to use AI in eclipse. My requirement is like this,

I want to auto generate CDS, Database tables , domain , data elements, directly in my package using the Prompt, now we have AI options like 

1)  Joule 

But Joule serves primarily as an assistant to enhance productivity. It offers AI-based capabilities that help in understanding complex development objects, generating code snippets, and providing interactive support through a chat interface.

for joule i have used this blog.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/joule-speaks-abap/ba-p/14018226

2) i have read this post also, which may be the possible way to achieve this functionality

I have gone through this post but its in beta and beta features are enabled in my cockpit, and still i am not able to see that option in my eclipse.  

teched2024-AD180/exercises/ex01/README.md at main · SAP-samples/teched2024-AD180 · GitHub

Can any one suggest me a solution, it will be helpful 

Thanks,

Basant

entry.title: Graduate Student Programs for SAP Certification - Seeking Advice
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently pursuing my Master's in Information Systems and have about 5 years of experience as an ABAP Developer.

As I continue my academic journey, I'm looking to enhance my credentials with the SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud  and SAP Fiori Application Developer certification. I'm specifically interested in:

  • Are there any special programs or discounts available for graduate students pursuing SAP certifications
  • Does SAP offer any university alliance programs that provide certification opportunities?
  • Has anyone here completed this certification while being a student? If so, what was your experience like?
  • Any recommendations on the best preparation resources for this certification that are budget-friendly for students?
  • Are there any mentorship programs available for students aiming to specialize in SAP development?

Additionally, if there are any specific grants, scholarships, or corporate sponsorship programs that support SAP certification for graduate students, I'd appreciate that information as well.

I believe this certification would strengthen my professional credentials and prior industry experience, making me more competitive in the job market as I advance my career in SAP development.

Thank you in advance for your insights and advice!

Best regards,
Kavyasri

entry.title: How to find all CDS views or tables involved in final CDS view
entry.content:
Hello,

How to find all CDS views or tables involved in final CDS view.

Here Where-used List will not useful. It gives final CDS where it was used.

I need all source CDS views or tables involved in final CDS view.

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Hide columns in Overall Release of Purchase Requisitions screen via My Inbox app
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I would like to seek for advice on how to hide a column in the Overall Release of Purchase Requisitions screen in My Inbox app. I am able to add 4 columns (Asset Number, Internal Number, GL Account and Cost Center) by using CDS View extension. After adding the columns, I was requested to hide one column (Connected Material) as the table now looks squished and that particular column is not in use. However, I am unable to use CDS Metadata extension because there is no annotation to allow metadata extension in the CDS C_PurRequisitionItemFs. Is there any way I could hide the column? Any advice would be appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: In CDS view group by clause not aggregating all records
entry.content:
Hello,

I have CDS view with Group by clause and result expecting one record but its giving three records.

I have used all fields in group by clause, The records are not aggregating as single record.

Any annotation require to aggregate or something missing in select statement?

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Processing exception during a "Render" operation. .ProcessingException: IO error detected while open
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I am working on adobe form and I am facing system error  as show below.

 


 I have done all the three tests of ADS
FP_TEST_00
FP_CHECK_DESTINATION_SERVICE
FP_PDF_TEST_00

All the three reports are giving the results as expected .

Earlier I did not understand what the system error is about. After going through few threads I could able to trace from where the error is coming and what the error is about.

CREATE_OUTPUT_CURRENT_FORM is the subroutine where I could able to capture the error.

The following is the error :

Processing exception during a "Render" operation. Request start time: Tue Apr 08 14:40:29 IST 2025 com.adobe.ProcessingException: com.adobe.ProcessingException: IO error detected while opening DEST connection: http://100.64.109.143:8080/sap/bc/fp/form/layout/ZMATERIAL_EXP_QA_CHECK2.XDP?fp-language=EN&fp-mlayout-sup=X&fp-cacheinfo=2025-04-07T05:34:18Z$5ef403a9-256d-4ee3-aaef-7f7832056b50$0$en$v1.0$ Exception Stack Trace: com.adobe.

NOTE : I am getting this error only in quality system . It is working fine in Development system.
Can you please let me know what is the cause of this system error and how to fix it. ?


I could able to find one post where the issue is the same as above and solution was offered to open backend system port connection from portal side. The thread is the below one. It is not clear to how to do it.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/problem-trying-read-data-from-destination/qaq-p/4290340

entry.title: Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest/content.xml.xz.
entry.content:
When we try to install ADT on eclipse platform we are getting this error  :-
Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest/content.xml.xz.
Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest/content.xml.xz.
PKIX path building failed: sun.security.provider.certpath.SunCertPathBuilderException: unable to find valid certification path to requested target
how to resolve it?

entry.title: BTP Trial account - prompted for username and pwd for ABAP env from BTP and from Eclipse
entry.content:
I have created (and deleted and re-created, and deleted and re-created in a new sub account) an ABAP environment on SAP BTP trial version.  This has been fine previously without issue.  A few weeks back I made some Fiori apps and did some auth relevant stuff.  Since then whenever I launch the ABAP env from BTP (by clicking the below) or try and connect via Eclipse browser logon (using incognito window too), I get prompted for a username and password - so annoying as my BTP name and pwd does not work.  I have tried everything I can think of, removed cookies and cache, used different browsers, deleted and recreated ABAP env using booster etc.  Nothing has worked.

Any ideas what it could be?  trust issues?  Any help much appreciated.

entry.title: ESR to MDR Proxy Migration
entry.content:
I am trying to convert a proxy from ESR to MDR, the error i am getting is "Inline type cannot be migrated. Firs convert inline to global type".

If someone has already faced this issue before, please let me know what needs to be done here.

Any help is appreciated!!

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Project in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have a BTP account and have several sub accounts in it which do not have ABAP instance setup in them.

Can we still add these sub accounts to the ABAP eclipse or we need to create an ABAP instance for them first ?

We would like to debug our app when we run it in these sub accounts by setting them up in the eclipse.

Appreciate your inputs.

entry.title: Actions in Behavior Definition For CDS Custom Entity
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

The scenario is;  I have created a RAP application that will display data from Web Service. CDS Custom entity was created and the query implementation class called Web service.

The next step is to save the data from my Fiori Report List into my custom Z* table and update the "Status" field on the Fiori List.

Why does the Read Entity result fail? 

What should be the way?

Kind regards, aatan.

entry.title: Send prompt from SAP GUI to AI Core service
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am trying to create an application on my SAP backend in SAP GUI that can send my prompts from GUI to SAP BTP AI core service .Can anyone guide me how can I achieve this?

entry.title: How to Add Custom Fields from Custom CDS View into OData based App Variant (PO Goods Receipt)?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm working on a Fiori Elements app variant (s2p.mm.im.goodsreceipt.purchaseorder) 

I'm using SAP Business Application Studio.

Requirement is to add some custom fields in the item table as new columns. I was able to add the column details and also put some placeholders. But I'm stuck on how to map the field values.

I have created a new CDS view with the required fields and then published it via the OData Annotation, also checked its functionality in the transaction- /IWFND/GW_CLIENT.

I have then imported this OData to the Adaptation project using the Add OData and UI5 Model Wizard provided. I could see the change also recorded. Now, I have the following questions.

1. How can I check if the OData is properly linked with the project or not?
2. How can I map the fields which are part of this new OData at an item level for each PO?

I'm working on UI for the first time. Any comment would be of great help.
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How can I make non-key field columns editable on Fiori Element List report?
entry.content:
Hi, 

I need SM30 functionality for TVARVC table in Fiori application using RAP model. I need Create, Edit, Delete option in the List itself without going to Object page as I need multi-line edit option.

Please let me know if anyone has implemented SM30 functionality using RAP?

Thanks,

BK

entry.title: TABSTRIP PROBLEM
entry.content:
Hey there! I created three screens 0100, 0101 and 0102, and for the 0100 contains some buttons, inputs and a tabstrip with two columns that refers to (0101 and 0102). the problem is when I want to execute the program it say's that I have a problem in the screen 0100 especially at the line 8.

Please note that when I activate the screens 0101 and 0102 it work succefully just the screen 0100 contains some problems.

I thought that maybe when I added the tabstrip in the 0100 I should add some code to the 0100.

You'll find the attachments below.

Thank you

entry.title: (RAP Application) - Using incoming value how to hide the entities (section) dynamically
entry.content:
Hi Developers,  

    My requirement is to conditionally hide sections based on a received value, but unfortunately. The solutions I have found so far are not adequate for my specific needs, and I'm continuing to search for a better solution.   

Help me out to overcome my issue   

Given the situation:
The system should dynamically manage the visibility of the partner entity during sales order creation, such that when the sales order type is one of 'MAKO', 'RTTC', or 'RTTR', the partner entity will be hidden from Application; conversely, for any other sales order type, the partner entity field must be shown to the user.

Found solutions:   

  1. Using Virtual Element in projection view  

         Some of the drawbacks include: 
            The entity (sections) cannot be hidden based on the incoming values. 
            Virtual element implementation will call only read the entity data not for modification face.  

     2. Control Fields with UI.Hidden Annotation  

  • Define Control Fields: Create control fields in your CDS view entity that determine the visibility of entities or sections.  
  • Bind to UI.Hidden: Use the UI.Hidden annotation and bind it to the control fields. This allows you to dynamically control visibility based on the values of these fields.  
  • Set Values Dynamically: Implement determination logic in your behavior definition to set the control field values based on incoming data.  

Some of the drawbacks include: 

  1. Unnecessarily create a field in CDS views. 
  2. Real-time customers won’t accept the dummy fields.  

       To illustrate:   

  1. Within my application, there are 10 sections, and in each section, I encounter difficulty in creating a field within my CDS view entity. Even though I managed to create 10 fields currently and they function as intended, there is a concern that future issues may arise once the application is handed over to the customer.  
  2. Because the customer wants to add another entity (Section) via the RAP Extension and simultaneously conceal a section contingent on a specific field's value, I cannot compel them to introduce an unnecessary placeholder field within their CDS view.   

 

Regards, 

Udhaya

entry.title: How to implement ODATA on Bapi?
entry.content: I'm new with ODATA. I have created a BAPI, CDS Views and want to use them together. Can I consume or implement ODATA on Bapi or is it the other way around? Is it possible to implement it using RAP?

entry.title: Not able to select the Path or choose file Using Abap Code
entry.content:
HI.
Need some help and suggestions.
There is one Custom Tcode for Z program. One of the functionalities is like Need to select the path from the Desktop, so that program will build one logic and output will be save into the selected location.

In Z-Tcode Once click on the F4, it is working as expected like asking user to choose the directory from the Desktop. But this Z-program is coming Fiori once select the F4. Not able to choose anything.

Please have a look on two views i had attached. I debug the code. from both GUI and Fiori. have not seen any return message from the below Piece of code. May I know why the issue is coming. Any settings need to be change. Please Correct me. and checked with Security team too any authorization missing issue. But they replied like everything is good from their side. Thank U.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON VALUE-REQUEST FOR p_fpath.

  CALL METHOD cl_gui_frontend_services=>directory_browse
    CHANGING
      selected_folder      = p_fpath
    EXCEPTIONS
      cntl_error           = 1
      error_no_gui         = 2
      not_supported_by_gui = 3
      OTHERS               = 4.
  IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
    gv_pathname = p_fpath.
    WRITE: gv_pathname.
  ENDIF.

entry.title: View for VBFA table
entry.content:
Hi all,

Good Day!

I am doing one development in cloud system and I need to take data from vbfa table but as we cannot use tables I tried using views 

  • I_SDDocumentProcessFlow 
  • I_SDDocumentMultiLevelProcFlow but both the view doesn’t have the data which vbfa table have.

can anyone please share the view which can be used in this case.

TIA
